content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_CustomerLookup
--drop view v_CustomerLookup
AS
SELECT          CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               ALCU AS [Search Key]
,               CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               YRE2 as [Vendor Number]
,               SMCD as [Sales Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep Name]
,               RESP as [Sales Manager ID]
,               CUCL AS [Market]
,               A330 AS [Sales Admin]
,               FRE1 AS [Business Unit]
,               CFC0 as [EDI Flag]
,               TEDL AS [Delivery Terms]
,               TEPY AS [Payment Terms]
,               CFC8 AS [Base Price List]
,               STAT AS [Status]
,               CUA1 AS [Address 1]
,               CUA2 AS [Address 2]
,               CUA3 AS [Address 3]
,               CUA4 AS [Address 4]
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
JOIN            M3.CSYTAB CS ON OC.SMCD = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SMCD'
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND A330 <> ''
